rows.label: qev060104_MSG0001
rows.name:
...Did you come to pick up this fuel cell
in place of the Zaruboggan?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060104_MSG0002
rows.name:
You're a lifesaver. I bought this mysterious alien machine
from a BLADE at a bargain price, but you see...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060104_MSG0003
rows.name:
The fuel cell used in it is... incredibly dangerous. If mishandled
even slightly, it could contaminate this entire area.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060104_MSG0004
rows.name: I was really at a loss as to what to do with it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060104_MSG0005
rows.name:
Here, take it.
Please be careful handling it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060104_MSG0007
rows.name:
...By the way, do you happen to know a BLADE
named Roselle?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060104_MSG0008
rows.name:
She was asking me all sorts of probing questions
about Shiraton and the Zaruboggan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060104_MSG0009
rows.name:
At the end, she handed me her business card and said,
"If you ever have any troublesome goods that need processing,
contact me..."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060104_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask for more details about that conversation.

rows.label: qev060104_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask if he plans to rely on that woman
instead of Shiraton from now on.

rows.label: qev060104_MSG0010
rows.name:
Like how many people the Zaruboggan are
collecting these sorts of things from...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060104_MSG0011
rows.name:
And also, she was very eager to hear about
how they go about processing it...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060104_MSG0012
rows.name:
...Well, she was an incredibly suspicious person,
so I didn't tell her a single thing I knew![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060104_MSG0013
rows.name:
No way! Not when there's someone like Shiraton
who's happy to take it off my hands for free.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060104_MSG0014
rows.name: I would never rely on such a suspicious person.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060104_MSG0015
rows.name:
If you see Shiraton later, could you pass on a message
telling him to watch out for that Roselle woman?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060104_MSG0016
rows.name:
I don't know who she is or what she's after...
But I got a really bad feeling about her.[ST:wait ]
